atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of left arm surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by specific movements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with movement of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with any kind of movement on his left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously took Tylenol for two to three days without relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies taking any other pain medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation with movement of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray did not reveal any broken bones or fractures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes 600 mg of ibuprofen three times daily for one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends ice or heat pad application.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends avoiding heavy lifting or strenuous activity with the left arm for at least three to four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders medications and procedures as discussed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends trying Advil or Aleve if the ibuprofen is not effective.
